title: rudbeckia fulgida var. deamii
intro: Rudbeckia fulgida var. deamii, also known as Deam's coneflower, is a perennial plant native to the prairies and open woods of the Midwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rudbeckia fulgida var. deamii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
